name: Sweep remaining raw Error('Session not found') throw sites to typed NotFoundError
description: Deferred sweep from WI-640 (WP-E15-typed-errors, PR #966): F-015 fixed the three audit-cited handlers (recordSystemPrompt, recordSessionEvent, flagContent in session-crud.ts), but ~11 sibling sites across the API still throw raw Error('Session not found') (or equivalent) -> 500 instead of typed NotFoundError -> 404. Same fix pattern as PR #966; mechanical sweep + per-site regression assertion. Sites enumerated in WI-640's completion summary, or rediscoverable by grepping apps/api/src for the raw 'Session not found' throw.
acceptanceCriteria: All 11 raw Error('Session not found') throw sites (session-summary.ts x2, session-crud.ts x2 — lines 1066/1276, homework-summary.ts, session-exchange.ts x3 incl. the Challenge-Round-state variant, session-events.ts x2, session-homework.ts; enumerated 2026-06-12, re-grep before starting) are converted to the typed NotFoundError pattern landed in PR #966. Outcome: no route-reachable path returns 500 for a missing session — global onError maps to 404. Sites reached only from background jobs (Inngest) get explicit judgment on retry semantics: if NotFoundError changes retry behavior, preserve current behavior and note it. Regression: per-file or shared test asserting typed-error mapping, red against pre-fix code; zero raw 'Session not found' Error throws remain in apps/api/src (grep-clean), making this a complete sweep — no forward-only guard needed unless sites are deliberately left.
